top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Strategy Raises Reserve to $3 Billion With Stock Sale
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. raised about $467 million through the sale of common stock, lifting its cash reserve to roughly $3 billion while refraining from buying or selling Bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Iran expands attacks on Gulf states after US strikes, says Strait of Hormuz closed - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Iran expands attacks on Gulf states after US strikes, says Strait of Hormuz closed  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix ADRs Tumble in Second Trading Day After Korea Selloff
top_signals.summary: An AI-fueled stock rout in South Korea spilled over into the US market Monday, as SK Hynix Inc. American depositary shares fell 9.3%, underscoring growing investor concerns that the boom is overextended.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Carolina governor taps Lindsey Graham's sister to serve as interim senator
top_signals.summary: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump to claim declassified intel reveals 2020 election interference: MS NOW
top_signals.summary: Trump said he will make a "Speech to the Nation on Thursday evening, at 9 P.M. Eastern," without providing further details.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

The 10 best state economies in America in 2026
top_signals.summary: Economy is one of the most important categories in CNBC’s annual America’s Top States for Business rankings. Several states stand out for economic strength.

top_signals.title: UK strikes landmark trade deal with Switzerland for crucial services sector
top_signals.summary: The British government estimates the free trade agreement to unlock £5.2 billion a year in exports to Switzerland over the coming years.

top_signals.title: UK inks trade deal with Switzerland – despite shouting match
top_signals.summary: The UK and Switzerland have inked a new free trade deal that ministers say will boost Britain’s services economy by some £5.2bn a year – despite talks breaking down just weeks ago to such an extent that both parties were “shouting at each other”. The agreement is the largest the UK has negotiated since it [...]

top_signals.title: Extreme heat threatens Italy’s Parmigiano-Reggiano heartland
top_signals.summary: In the heat, cows spend more time lying down, eat less and produce up to 10% less milk, one of Parmigiano-Reggiano's ⁠only three ingredients alongside salt and rennet.
